heroHeadline: CDMX: 701 Years of History, One Living City
heroSubtitle: From Tenochtitlan's founding in 1325 to a 22-million-person megacity — tracking seven centuries of governance, upheaval, and transformation under Mayor Clara Brugada.
footerNote: Data sourced from official CDMX government reports (Gobierno CDMX, SSC, SACMEX, SEMOVI), INEGI, INE, CONAGUA, Fiscalía CDMX, Congreso CDMX, El Universal, La Jornada, Animal Político, Reforma, Reuters, AP, and institutional analyses from CIDE, UNAM, IMCO, and México Evalúa.
